← Back to demos

Datetime Engine

A headless date/time picker engine. It owns the calendar-grid arithmetic, the selection (single / range), the hover preview, time, navigation and constraints, and emits that state. Every pixel below is rendered by the demo consumer (datetime-engine/datetime-engine.demo.js) from that state — the engine ships no DOM, no CSS, and does no formatting (the human-readable labels here are produced by the demo with Intl.DateTimeFormat).

:

Mode

Constraints

“disable past days” calls setMin(today); “disable weekends” passes a predicate. The grid re-tags live.

Presets & typed input

The engine does not parse strings. The demo parses with the minimal parseISODate helper, then feeds the result to setDate().

Emitted state 0 emits
